description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the scorpil/rust:nightly Docker image and runs a before_script to update apt and install libsdl2-2.0-0 and libsdl2-dev. Define a single job named test:cargo in the default test stage that first executes rustc --version && cargo --version, then runs cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --release. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
